sentences.target: Je lis un livre dans le train.
sentences.reading: /ʒə li œ̃ livʁ dɑ̃ lə tʁɛ̃/

translations.fr: Je lis un livre dans le train.
translations.ipa: /ʒə li œ̃ livʁ dɑ̃ lə tʁɛ̃/
translations.en: I’m reading a book on the train.
translations.es: Estoy leyendo un libro en el tren.
translations.de: Ich lese im Zug ein Buch.
translations.it: Sto leggendo un libro sul treno.
translations.pt: Estou lendo um livro no trem.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đọc sách trên tàu.
translations.nl: Ik lees een boek in de trein.
translations.hi: मैं ट्रेन में किताब पढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leser en bok på toget.
translations.id: Saya sedang membaca buku di kereta.
translations.sv: Jag läser en bok på tåget.
translations.da: Jeg læser en bog i toget.
translations.ja: 電車で本を読んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular, agreeing with the subject.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introduces the noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'train'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans' indicating location.

sentences.target: Il y a un livre sur la table.
sentences.reading: /il i a œ̃ livʁ syʁ la tabl/

translations.fr: Il y a un livre sur la table.
translations.ipa: /il i a œ̃ livʁ syʁ la tabl/
translations.en: There is a book on the table.
translations.es: Hay un libro sobre la mesa.
translations.de: Auf dem Tisch liegt ein Buch.
translations.pt: Há um livro sobre a mesa.
translations.vi: Có một cuốn sách trên bàn.
translations.nl: Er liegt een boek op tafel.
translations.el: Υπάρχει ένα βιβλίο πάνω στο τραπέζι.
translations.nb: Det ligger en bok på bordet.
translations.id: Ada sebuah buku di atas meja.
translations.sv: Det ligger en bok på bordet.
translations.da: Der ligger en bog på bordet.

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/dummy subject pronoun used in the existential construction 'il y a'.
Clitic locative pronoun; part of the fixed existential expression 'il y a'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; in 'il y a' expresses existence ('there is/are').
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introduces the noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; the entity introduced by the existential construction.
Preposition marking location ('on').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'table'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Tu prends ce livre pour ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ty pʁɑ̃ sə livʁ puʁ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Tu prends ce livre pour ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ty pʁɑ̃ sə livʁ puʁ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: You’re taking this book for tonight.
translations.es: Te llevas este libro para esta noche.
translations.de: Du nimmst dieses Buch für heute Abend mit.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤에 이 책을 가져갈 거야.
translations.ru: Ты берёшь эту книгу на вечер.
translations.pt: Você leva este livro para hoje à noite.
translations.he: אתה לוקח את הספר הזה להיום בערב.
translations.tr: Bu kitabı bu akşam için alıyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn đang lấy cuốn sách này cho tối nay.
translations.ar: أنت تأخذ هذا الكتاب لهذه الليلة.
translations.nl: Je neemt dit boek voor vanavond.
translations.uk: Ти береш цю книгу на сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hu: Elviszed ezt a könyvet ma estére.
translations.hi: तुम आज रात के लिए यह किताब ले रहे हो.
translations.pl: Bierzesz tę książkę na dziś wieczór.
translations.el: Παίρνεις αυτό το βιβλίο για απόψε.
translations.nb: Du tar med denne boken til i kveld.
translations.id: Kamu mengambil buku ini untuk malam ini.
translations.sv: Du tar den här boken till i kväll.
translations.cs: Bereš tuhle knihu na dnešní večer.
translations.da: Du tager denne bog til i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜のためにこの本を持っていく。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular (informal).
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular, agreeing with the subject.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular (before consonant), modifies 'livre'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the verb.
Preposition indicating purpose/time.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'soir' to form a temporal expression.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition 'pour' indicating time.

sentences.target: Nous rangeons le livre dans le sac.
sentences.reading: /nu ʁɑ̃ʒɔ̃ lə livʁ dɑ̃ lə sak/

translations.fr: Nous rangeons le livre dans le sac.
translations.ipa: /nu ʁɑ̃ʒɔ̃ lə livʁ dɑ̃ lə sak/
translations.en: We’re putting the book in the bag.
translations.es: Estamos metiendo el libro en la bolsa.
translations.de: Wir legen das Buch in die Tasche.
translations.it: Stiamo mettendo il libro nella borsa.
translations.yue: 我哋將本書放入個袋度。
translations.pt: Estamos colocando o livro na bolsa.
translations.he: אנחנו שמים את הספר בתוך התיק.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang bỏ cuốn sách vào túi.
translations.nl: We doen het boek in de tas.
translations.hi: हम किताब को बैग में रख रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami memasukkan buku ke dalam tas.
translations.da: Vi lægger bogen ned i tasken.
translations.ja: 本をバッグに入れています。
